previousAuditComparison.description: Comparison of current vs previous audit for common checkpoints, highlighting rectification effectiveness and recurring control failures.

auditorObservationTracking.description: Auditor observations and recommendations across current and previous audit schedules, supporting continuity tracking.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleRecommendation: Implement bi-annual training for new HR policies.

auditCompletionSummary.description: Final audit execution outcome covering coverage %, compliance score, issue density, and schedule adherence at both audit start and end.
